creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
Hello there, thanks for submitting this entry. Actually this is a
question and not a PR yet.  We need some more information from you
actually; while booting can you type ''boot -v'' so that we have
detailed information?

Also to eliminate things; are you using a new ATA80 cable instead of
the old ATA66 cables?
Does this problem occur on other OS'ses as well?

Thanks!
remko
-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
